name: Quick Smoke Test
description: A minimal plan to verify Agent Task Player works. Hit Play and watch it run.

tasks.name: Create hello.ts
tasks.prompt: Create a file called hello.ts that exports a function greet(name: string): string which returns `Hello, ${name}!`. Keep it simple, just the function and export.

tasks.name: Add a test
tasks.prompt: Create hello.test.ts that imports greet from ./hello and tests it with a few assertions using Node's built-in assert module. Test with 'World' and an empty string.

tasks.name: Run the test
tasks.prompt: Run the test file hello.test.ts using ts-node or tsx. If it passes, print 'All tests passed'. If there are any issues with the test, fix them.
